revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月三十]][[zh:七月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月三十]][[zh:七月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月三十]][[zh:七月三十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月三十]][[zh:七月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 30|qq=July 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> == Events == * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1281|en|1281|qid=Q5537|lt=1281|1=1281}} {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} ) – From this day through the following day, violent rain and winds swept over the region. The {{ill|Yuan dynasty|en|Yuan dynasty|qid=Q7313|lt=Yuan|1=Yuan dynasty}} army of the {{ill|Battle of Kōan|en|Battle of Kōan|qid=Q2237622|lt=Kōan War|1=Battle of Kōan}} was annihilated ({{ill|Kamikaze (typhoon)|en|Kamikaze (typhoon)|qid=Q1565008|lt=divine wind|1=Kamikaze (typhoon)}} ).
== Births == * {{ill|Bunshō|en|Bunshō|qid=Q1193596|lt=Bunshō|1=Bunshō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1466|en|1466|qid=Q6559|lt=1466|1=1466}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshitane|en|Ashikaga Yoshitane|qid=Q708527|lt=Ashikaga Yoshitoki|1=Ashikaga Yoshitane}} (also known as {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshichika|ja|足利義材|lt=Ashikaga Yoshichika|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshichika|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足利義稙|1=Ashikaga Yoshitane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q708527}} ){{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} , the 10th Shogun of the {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|lt=Muromachi Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (died {{ill|1523|en|1523|qid=Q6302|lt=1523|1=1523}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} 1st Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Tameyoshi|en|Minamoto no Tameyoshi|qid=Q1381638|lt=Minamoto Tameyoshi|1=Minamoto no Tameyoshi}} , a military commander and head of the {{ill|Kawachi Genji|en|Kawachi Genji|qid=Q5360652|lt=Kawachi Genji|1=Kawachi Genji}} (born {{ill|1096|en|1096|qid=Q19485|lt=1096|1=1096}} ). * {{ill|Bunki|en|Bunki|qid=Q1324885|lt=Bunki|1=Bunki}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1502|en|1502|qid=Q6137|lt=1502|1=1502}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} ) – {{ill|Sōgi|en|Sōgi|qid=Q923562|lt=Sōgi|1=Sōgi}} , a master of renga (linked-verse poetry) (born {{ill|1421|en|1421|qid=Q6213|lt=1421|1=1421}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|29|8|1|6|30|8|7|0730|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
